Enabled.Name: Enable Skjaldborg full combat workflow
Enabled.Hint: Adds Statement, Movement, Resolution, and Bookkeeping workflow automation to AoV combats.

RequireAllCommit.Name: Require all capable combatants to commit
RequireAllCommit.Hint: Optional strict mode. When enabled, Statement cannot advance until every capable combatant has committed or held an intent. Disabled by default so the GM may advance freely.

MovementRounding.Name: Movement DEX penalty rounding
MovementRounding.Hint: How partial 3 m / 10 ft movement units are converted into DEX penalties.

MovementTickDelay.Name: Movement tick delay
MovementTickDelay.Hint: Delay in milliseconds between Skjaldborg movement checkpoints during the v13 compatibility movement phase.

Short.Name: Short melee reach
Short.Hint: Grid-unit engagement distance when unarmed or using a readied melee weapon up to 1 meter long.

Medium.Name: Medium melee reach
Medium.Hint: Grid-unit engagement distance for a readied melee weapon over 1 meter and up to 2 meters long.

Long.Name: Long melee reach
Long.Hint: Grid-unit engagement distance for a readied melee weapon over 2 meters long.

ChatReports.Name: Post phase reports to chat
ChatReports.Hint: Creates short chat cards when phases advance and resolution queues are generated.

Debug.Name: Debug logging
Debug.Hint: Enable all Skjaldborg diagnostic output with one switch, including general logs and every movement-debug category at trace detail.

MovementDebugMenu.Name: Movement debugger
MovementDebugMenu.Label: Configure movement debugger
MovementDebugMenu.Hint: Temporary v13 diagnostics for Skjaldborg movement capture, route execution, collision, and engagement.
MovementDebugMenu.Title: Skjaldborg Movement Debugger
MovementDebugMenu.ExportCopied: Movement debug JSON copied to clipboard and logged to the console.
MovementDebugMenu.ExportLogged: Movement debug JSON logged to the console.

General.Name: Diagnostic output
General.Hint: Movement diagnostics are GM-facing console logs only. Leave disabled outside active troubleshooting.

Enabled.Name: Enable movement debugger
Enabled.Hint: Write structured movement diagnostics to the browser console.

Level.Name: Movement debug level
Level.Hint: Summary logs key lifecycle events. Verbose adds per-context data. Trace includes full routes and checkpoints.

Categories.Name: Diagnostic categories
Categories.Hint: Limit logging to the movement areas currently under investigation.

capture.Name: Capture and gating
capture.Hint: Intent-phase token movement capture, phase gates, ownership, and blocking decisions.

socket.Name: Socket and sanitization
socket.Hint: GM-authoritative movement writes and sanitized payload shape.

route.Name: Route normalization
route.Hint: Raw route, preserved waypoints, destination, and duplicate filtering.

expansion.Name: Waypoint expansion
expansion.Hint: Per-segment complete-path calls and fallback checkpoint generation.

run.Name: Movement run lifecycle
run.Hint: Movement phase run start, contexts, completion, and result summaries.

scheduler.Name: Scheduler ticks
scheduler.Hint: Per-tick context indices, submitted moves, waits, and results.

collision.Name: Collision and reservation
collision.Hint: Occupied grid rectangles, reservations, blockers, and queued movement.

engagement.Name: Engagement and reach
engagement.Hint: Disposition checks, reach thresholds, occupied-grid separation, and engagement pair creation.

stop.Name: Stop hooks
stop.Hint: moveToken/stopToken hooks, stop reasons, and distance used for stopped movement.

status.Name: Status cleanup
status.Hint: Engaged ActiveEffect synchronization and manual cleanup.

dex.Name: DEX distance inputs
dex.Hint: Movement distances and path data that feed DEX penalties.

ActionUiMenu.Name: Action interface configuration
ActionUiMenu.Label: Configure action interface
ActionUiMenu.Hint: Configure the shared quick-access circles, token action ring, and selected-actor hotbar in one client-specific submenu.
ActionUiMenu.Title: Skjaldborg Action Interface

ActionRingGroup.Name: Token action ring
ActionRingGroup.Hint: Control the radial action selector opened from the core Token HUD and the quick-access circles shared with the actor hotbar.

ActorHotbarGroup.Name: Selected-actor hotbar
ActorHotbarGroup.Hint: Control the actor-specific replacement hotbar shown for one unambiguous owned actor.

ReportMenu.Name: Phase report configuration
ReportMenu.Label: Configure phase reports
ReportMenu.Hint: Choose which phases create reports and control chat visibility, recipients, and combatant detail scope.
ReportMenu.Title: Skjaldborg Phase Reports

Phases.Name: Report phases
Phases.Hint: Post a report when entering each selected phase. Multiple phases may be selected.

Delivery.Name: Delivery mode
Delivery.Hint: Public cards create one all-combatant message visible to everyone. Whispered delivery creates only the audience-specific private cards.

Recipients.Name: Whisper recipients
Recipients.Hint: Used only for whispered delivery. Gamemasters receive one full report. Including players creates a separate scoped player report that is not shown in the gamemaster chat log.

Scope.Name: Player report scope
Scope.Hint: Applies only to the player whisper when recipients include players. GM reports always include all capable combatants. Public reports include all combatants. GM-private intent text is never included.

ActionRing.Name: Enable token action ring
ActionRing.Hint: Adds a Crucible Tongs-style action ring to the core Token HUD. It always mirrors the represented actor's configured quick-access circles, including during Skjaldborg combat.

ActionRingMaxItems.Name: Quick-access circles
ActionRingMaxItems.Hint: Sets 6 to 12 visible quick-access circles for both the selected-actor hotbar and the token action ring. Assignments hidden by a lower count are preserved.

ActorHotbar.Name: Enable actor hotbar
ActorHotbar.Hint: Shows a selected-actor hotbar with resources, customizable quick access, Skjaldborg intent controls, sheet-derived statistics, history and family, skills, magic, equipment, effects, and macros.

ReplaceCoreHotbar.Name: Replace the core macro hotbar
ReplaceCoreHotbar.Hint: Hide the core macro hotbar while the custom actor hotbar has an owned actor. Macros remain available on the Macros tab.

ActorHotbarScale.Name: Actor hotbar scale
ActorHotbarScale.Hint: Scales the complete actor hotbar for this client.

ActorHotbarActionWidth.Name: Actor action-bar maximum width
ActorHotbarActionWidth.Hint: Sets the maximum width of the named actor-action lists and user macro grid.

ActorHotbarPosition.Name: Actor hotbar position
ActorHotbarPosition.Label: Reset position
ActorHotbarPosition.Hint: Return the draggable actor hotbar to its default position above the core hotbar.

ActorHotbarOpacity.Name: Actor hotbar resting opacity
ActorHotbarOpacity.Hint: Sets the hotbar opacity while it is idle. Hovering, focusing an input, or dragging temporarily restores full opacity.

ActionUiTheme.Name: Action interface visual theme
ActionUiTheme.Hint: Choose the Age of Vikings textured presentation or the previous classic Crucible-style presentation for the token action ring and actor hotbar.

PhaseStructureMenu.Name: Combat phase structure
PhaseStructureMenu.Label: Configure combat phases
PhaseStructureMenu.Hint: Choose which Skjaldborg phases appear in each logical combat round, or apply the optional Streamlined Combat structure.
PhaseStructureMenu.Title: Skjaldborg Combat Phase Structure
PhaseStructureMenu.Intro: The selected phases are shown in canonical order. Disabled phases are skipped visibly, while required movement, resolution preparation, bookkeeping, and round-reset automation is preserved at the appropriate boundary.

Phases.Name: Phases present in each round
Phases.Hint: At least one phase must remain enabled. The default tactical structure uses all four phases.

intent.Hint: Participants declare and commit actions and planned movement before acting.

movement.Hint: All predeclared nonengaged movement routes execute together before resolution.

resolution.Hint: Actions, missiles, spells, reactions, and the DEX-ordered queue are resolved.

bookkeeping.Hint: Round outcomes are finalized and prepared for application before the next round.

PhaseStructureMenu.StreamlinedHint: The streamlined preset keeps Resolution as the visible DEX countdown. Declarations and movement are handled immediately when announced, while bookkeeping is finalized immediately after each resolved outcome.

CombatTrackingMenu.Name: Combat tracking
CombatTrackingMenu.Label: Configure combat tracking
CombatTrackingMenu.Hint: Configure phase validation, movement DEX rounding and timing, and melee engagement reach in one GM-only submenu.
CombatTrackingMenu.Title: Skjaldborg Combat Tracking
CombatTrackingMenu.Intro: These world settings control how strictly the tracker validates declarations and how movement contributes to DEX and engagement. Phase navigation itself remains GM-authoritative.

Navigation.Name: Phase navigation
Navigation.Hint: The all-intents requirement is optional. With it disabled, the GM may leave Statement even when some combatants have not declared an action.

Movement.Name: Movement and DEX
Movement.Hint: Configure movement penalty rounding and the delay between simultaneous movement checkpoints.

Reach.Name: Melee engagement reach
Reach.Hint: Set the grid-unit contact distance used for short, medium, and long readied melee weapons.

Hud.Title: Skjaldborg
Hud.MovementNote: Drag a combatant token during Statement to declare its route. The token stays in place until the Movement phase.
Hud.NoLedger: DEX is calculated when the GM advances from Movement to Resolution.
Hud.NoQueue: No resolution queue has been built yet.
Hud.MovementNoteImmediate: Drag the combatant token to announce movement. The route is captured and executed immediately after the GM persists it.
Hud.NoLedgerImmediate: DEX is calculated immediately when the action is announced and refreshed after immediate movement completes.

Dex.CarryoverDexZero: DEX rank was reduced to 0 or below.

Chat.NoCombatants: No combatants match this report scope.
Chat.FullMovementRule: Full movement only sets final DEX to 0.
Chat.PreventedRule: Final DEX is 0 or below; the action carries over.

MovementAutomation.EngagedCannotMove: This combatant is engaged and cannot declare ordinary movement.

Diagnostics.Failed: Skjaldborg diagnostics found {count} issue(s). See the console table for details.

Warnings.GmOnly: Only a GM can perform this combat control.
Warnings.NoGm: No active GM is available to receive the combat request.
Warnings.SocketTimeout: The active GM did not acknowledge the combat request.
Warnings.NoCombat: No active combat is available for this control.
Warnings.NotOwner: You do not control this combatant.
Warnings.StaleDocument: This combat state changed after the HUD rendered. Reopen or refresh the HUD and try again.
Warnings.InvalidPhase: That phase transition is not legal from the current phase.
Warnings.MovementRunning: Movement automation is still resolving. Wait for movement to complete before advancing.
Warnings.MovementPlansPending: Cannot begin Movement: the plans for {names} are still synchronizing or unfinished. Wait for the movement-plan confirmation, or clear and plan those routes again.
Warnings.NoCombatant: Select or activate a combatant first.
Warnings.Uncommitted: Cannot advance: these combatants have not committed or held intent: {names}
Warnings.FormUnavailable: The Skjaldborg combat HUD form is unavailable.
Warnings.ItemUnavailable: That actor item is no longer available.
Warnings.ActionFailed: The selected action could not be completed. See the browser console for details.
Warnings.ResourceUpdateFailed: The actor resource could not be updated. See the browser console for details.
Warnings.StatUnavailable: That actor statistic is no longer available.
Warnings.WeaponMustBeCarried: Only a carried weapon can be drawn.
Warnings.SelectCarriedWeapon: Select a carried weapon to draw.
Warnings.AtLeastOnePhase: At least one combat phase must remain enabled. Resolution has been retained as the safety fallback.
Warnings.DisabledPhase: That phase is disabled in the current combat phase structure.
Warnings.MovementDraftsSkipped: The following combatants still have unfinished movement drafts; those drafts will not execute: {names}

ActionRing.IntentHint: Click to commit. Shift-click or right-click for details.
ActionRing.ItemHint: Click to use. Right-click opens Item details when available.
ActionRing.QuickAccessHint: Click to use a quick-access action. Right-click opens Item details when available.

ActorHotbar.NoMagic: No rune scripts, Seiðr spells, or powers are available.
ActorHotbar.Move: Right-drag portrait to move actor hotbar
ActorHotbar.NoStats: No rollable actor statistics are available.
ActorHotbar.NoEquipment: No weapons, gear, or armour are available.

QuickAccess.RemoveHint: Right-click to remove from quick access.
QuickAccess.PortraitDropHint: Drop an actor-hotbar action on the portrait to assign it to the first empty quick-access slot.
QuickAccess.Full: All visible quick-access circles are occupied. Drop directly onto a circle to replace or swap it, or increase the circle count in settings.

ActorHotbar.NoHistoryFamily: No history, family, passion, devotion, thrall, or farm records are available.

Tracker.SimultaneousGroup: Member of a simultaneous resolution group

Weapons.DrawHint: Ready the selected carried weapon and reduce initiative by 5 DEX.
Weapons.SheatheHint: Sheathe the currently readied weapon and reduce initiative by 5 DEX.
Weapons.DropHint: Clear the currently readied weapon without changing initiative.
